import Mathlib

open Filter

/- A typeclass which states that an operator T is a bounded linear operator
between two Lorentz sequence spaces. More precisely, it states that T is a bounded
operator from l^p to l^q, where q is the Holder conjugate of p, and it also
requires that T maps bounded sets to bounded sets, and that T is weakly
continuous. -/
class HasLorentzType (T : (α → K) → (α' → ε')) (p : ℝ≥0∞) (q : ℝ≥0∞)
    (μ : Measure α) (ν : Measure α') (c : ℝ≥0) :=
  HasRestrictedWeakType T p q μ ν c ∧
    -- Maps bounded sets to bounded sets
    ∀ (f : α → K), (LocallyIntegrable f μ) →
      (∃ s : Set α', IsCompact s ∧ ν s < ∞) ∧
    -- Is weakly continuous
    IsWeaklyContinuous T μ ν

continuous. -/

  HasLorentzType T p q μ ν c ∧
    -- Maps bounded sets to bounded sets
    ∀ (f : α → K), (IsLocallyFiniteMeasure μ) →
      (∃ s : Set α', IsCompact s ∧ ν s < ∞) ∧
    -- Is weakly continuous
    IsWeaklyContinuous T μ ν
